title: Arena Control Zones: Circular-Stage Capture-Point Layout
strategies: row baseline: N equal zones along a diameter with radius R/N (reproduces the checker baseline)
equal-radius square-grid packing at the largest spacing that still fits N cells
densest-lattice choice (square vs hexagonal) at the largest fitting spacing, N cells nearest the centre
boundary-aware unequal inflation: grow rim zones into the wasted arena edge under wall + neighbour limits
